author: Hidden Shadow
review: They are constantly going into our units, every 1-2 months and having us clear our storage spaces when the units are too small to put anything anyway! They dont have nearly enough parking for the permits they give out, and have no respect

author: Anna-Marie S
review: My partner and I have lived here for about two years. The only reason we are leaving is due to job opportunities in another state. This apartment complex has been an incredible place to call home.

author: Hayley Anderson
review: My partner and I are so excited to be living here. Its a beautiful property and the recent remodel has left all the apartments gorgeous, modern and with all new Whirlpool brand appliances. The pool and sauna are super clean and the on sight manager is incredibly friendly and helpful. Looking forward to a wonderful summer in our new home.

author: Quentin Ross
review: I will be leaving your residence.  I was intrigued the way the until was built. The main reason I decided to be a tenant was due to the patio that was available. I havent been able to go out on my patio in over a month.  I found black mold

author: personwithoutvideos
review: My dad lived here from 2008-2011 and probably before then. As a kid it was very accommodating, the pool never had too many people and it was a great temperature and size. The appartment layout had one bedroom, but it was wasn't too small,

author: Britt Schmal
review: I didn't live here, but my husband did for a short while when he worked in Washington. The management was very accommodating during the weeks our daughter and I came up to visit. Let us use the spare key to get in to the apartment on our

author: Andrew Green
review: The place is pretty much a non stop construction site. The management is remodeling every single unit they can so they can jack up the rent to an unreasonable price. Small one bedrooms go for $990 and this is Northwest Ave, not exactly the

author: LeAnn VanderPol
review: We moved in April and love our apartment, it clean,completely remodeled and couldnt be happier with the on site management. Wanda has been great to us and we love the pool,very clean and well kept.Its quite too,they dont allow partying,
